user.title: GHL ProfiLux — Local connection
user.description:
Enter the IP address of your ProfiLux and its login credentials.

{ws_note}

data_description.host: IP address of the ProfiLux on your LAN (e.g. 192.168.1.50).
data_description.username: Username configured on the controller (default: admin).

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials (HTTP 401). Check username and password on the controller.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the ProfiLux. Check the IP, ensure the controller is reachable, and that the WebSocket interface is enabled.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check Home Assistant logs for details.
